name: Cerberus, The Triple Demon.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

**[PART 3 OF 11 FOR MY HELLTAKER SERIES.]**

The Triple Dog Demons of Hell. They are all one soul, in 3 bodies.
This one is probably the most complicated for me to make. Please let me know if there are any problems.

Art and Character by [VanRipper](https://twitter.com/vanripperart).
![cerbdan](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/helltaker/images/6/64/DanceCerberus.gif/revision/latest?cb=20200621231716)
*Next: Malina, The Sour Demon.*
creator: wisperrr
